CustomField.description: The date when the reduction of the agreed value takes effect. For example, if the lease commencement date is March 15, 2024, and the first reduction is scheduled to begin on January 1, 2025, no reduction will be applied from March 15, 2024, to December 31, 2024. During this initial period, the original agreed value will be maintained. From January 1, 2025, the agreed value will be adjusted according to the reduction schedule.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date when the reduction of the agreed value begins. For example, if the lease starts on March 15, 2024, and the first reduction is scheduled to start on January 1, 2025, the reduction will not apply from March 15 to December 31, 2024. The original agreed value will be shown during this period. From January 1, 2025, the reduction will be applied to the agreed value for each schedule.
CustomField.label: 1st AV Reduction Start Date
